description_text: Product Description 4pcs ABS Matte Carbon Fiber Look Sport Style Car Front Bumper Fins Spoiler Wing Lip Splitter Specification: 100% Brand New and Good Quality Universal fit for most of cars Material: High Quality ABS Size: as picture shown Color: Matte Carbon Fiber Waterproof, Never Fade, Never Rust Quick and easy way to add a body side wing spoiler/lip to virtually any car for an aggressive sporty look Protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages Easy to install Package includes: 4Pcs Spoiler Wing Payment Returns Contact Us Shipping We accept payment by PayPal only ! Payment should be completed within 5 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. e-check from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.Your order will be usually shipped out the same or next business days once the payment is made and cleared. Welcome to our Store ~
